testcase.name: test_create_custom_role_with_permissions
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iam_permission_matrix.py:193: in test_create_custom_role_with_permissions assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create role: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create role: {"detail":"Role with this name already exists"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
